report_title: PetHub Online - Full Affiliate Compliance Scan

key_finding.description: ALL affiliate links have rel='noopener noreferrer sponsored' - the sponsored attribute IS correctly present everywhere. The only compliance gap is the missing 'nofollow' attribute. 14 of 15 pages with affiliate links are affected (141 of 142 total affiliate links).
key_finding.sponsored_compliance: 100% - every affiliate link has sponsored in rel

disclosure_status.description: All 15 pages containing affiliate links have proper disclosure divs present and correctly placed. Zero pages with affiliate content are missing disclosures.

draft_dog_food_posts_status.description: All 4 draft Dog Food posts (3836-3839) are fully compliant. They have disclosure divs pre-installed and currently contain no affiliate links (links will be added before publishing).
